sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I can see the structure clearly. There are 3 horizontal rows of colored squares:
1. Top row (rows 17-18): R R R c S S c b b c p p c Y Y c p p c N N N
2. Middle row (rows 26-27): R R R c w w c b b c b b c w w c S S c p p c g g c S S c g g c g g c N N N
3. Bottom row (rows 35-36): R R R c w w c S S c b b c w w c b b c S S c p p c b b c g g c S S c N N N
Wait, the R and N at the edges are the crosses, not the colored squares. Let me re-read:
- Row 17: RRR (red cross) c SS c bb c pp c YY c pp c NNN (green cross)
- Row 26: RRR (red cross) c ww c bb c bb c ww c SS c pp c gg c SS c gg c gg c NNN (green cross)
- Row 35: RRR (red cross) c ww c SS c bb c ww c bb c SS c pp c bb c gg c SS c NNN (green cross)
The crosses are at:
- Top: R at (16,19), N at (16,38)
- Middle: R at (25,13), N at (25,47)
- Bottom: R at (34,13), N at (34,47)
There are also vertical columns of squares between the rows:
- Left column: p at (20,23), g at (23,23), w at (29,23), w at (32,23), Y at (38,23), g at (41,23), S at (44,23)
- Right column: b at (20,35), S at (23,35), w at (29,35), g at (32,35), w at (38,35), b at (41,35)
And there's a bottom row at rows 44-44: S c S c p p c p p c g g
The yellow frames are at:
- (17,32): around the Y square in the top row
- (38,23): around the Y square in the left column
The yellow 1x1 markers form a frame around the center area (cols 34-37, rows 25-37).
I think the structure is:
- 3 horizontal rows that can be shifted independently
- Each row has a red cross on the left and a green cross on the right
- The yellow frames indicate goal positions
Let me try clicking the middle-left red cross to see what it does.
